## Summary

Describe the QA/QC template or documentation change.

## Evidence Value

- [ ] Improves FAT readiness.
- [ ] Improves SAT readiness.
- [ ] Improves supplier evidence review.
- [ ] Improves commissioning or handover traceability.

## Validation

- [ ] Markdown tables render cleanly.
- [ ] No project-confidential information is included.
- [ ] Acceptance evidence is specific and inspectable.
